I can do that — I found your appointment and just need a couple details before I reschedule.

Current appointment:
- Title: Dentist Appointment
- When: 2024-05-18, 09:00–10:00
- Location: Downtown Dental Clinic
- Event ID: 5

What would you like me to do?
- Option A — give me the new date and start time (format YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM). I can keep the same 1‑hour duration unless you provide an end time.
- Option B — “Move by X days/hours” (e.g., “move 7 days later”).
- Option C — find the next free slot for you (tell me preferred days/times: mornings, afternoons, earliest/latest date range).

Also tell me:
- Do you want me to notify anyone about the change (the event currently only has your email)? If yes, provide the dentist’s/clinic email or confirm I should only update your calendar.
- Any other constraints (preferred clinic, not before/after a certain time, etc.)?

Reply with one of the options above and the needed details and I’ll reschedule it.
